title: Advanced Patterns
description: Switch statements, object lookup, and conditional classes.

slides.title: Object Lookup for Multiple Conditions 🔑
Example: Conditional Classes
slides.content: Dynamically setting className based on state:

quizData.question: What is a benefit of using an object lookup for conditional rendering?

options.text: It makes adding new cases easier and keeps code organized
It's the only way to handle more than two conditions

quizData.explanation: Object lookup provides a clean, maintainable way to map values to outputs, especially for many cases.
